message:
chore: add out/ and beads_*.db to .gitignore

- out/: e2e test output directories generated during integration runs
- beads_*.db: local beads issue tracker SQLite databases (runtime artifacts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,5 +62,11 @@ fuzz/target/
 # NTM agent coordination
 .ntm/
 
+# Build output directories
+out/
+
+# Beads local databases
+beads_*.db
+
 # Compiled binaries
 a.out
